Dairy Queen — Change of Ownership Form

Complete all sections below. Click "Submit" when done — your responses will be sent directly to the DQ After Hours team.

Store information
DAIRY QUEEN #
Enter the 5 digits of your store number — will be submitted as DQ0XXXXX
  1. The form must be completed at least 15 days prior to the anticipated transfer date.
  2. Please provide the exact change of ownership date, rather than an estimated date.
  3. Our team requires a minimum of 5 business days' advance notice for any updates on the change of ownership dates, after the request is being submitted.
New owner contact information
*
*
Processor information (provided by Fiserv)
The BUYER must contact Fiserv to setup new merchant accounts for credit cards, Olo mobile ordering, and gift cards. This step must be completed 30 days prior to the anticipated transfer date. Contact Fiserv at 800-677-7115, option 1. Account creation can take up to 10 business days.
Terminal ID (TID) information:
1. Usually, the Terminal IDs are 6 character alphanumeric values. Example: M00000
2. The TIDs must be configured for Point of Sale Solution Name: VFIPAYwareConnectRC.
Active devices
Where do I find the serial number?
Serial numbers are located on the back of every device. They are a nine (9) digit number separated into groups of three (3).
Example: 123-456-789

Please list below the active devices used in the store:
